text: The beginning of the good news about Jesus the Messiah the Son of God
as it is written in Isaiah the prophet I will send my messenger ahead of you
a voice of one calling in the wilderness prepare the way for the Lord
And so John the Baptist appeared in the wilderness preaching a baptism of repentance
After John was put in prison Jesus went into Galilee proclaiming the good news of God
The time has come he said the kingdom of God has come near repent and believe the good news
A few days later when Jesus again entered Capernaum the people heard that he had come home
They gathered in such large numbers that there was no room left not even outside the door
Again Jesus began to teach by the lake the crowd that gathered around him was very large
He taught them many things by parables and in his teaching said listen a farmer went out to sow his seed
